## X-Sense Home Security v1.3.11.6

### Cameras
- Treats ADDX camera record-history rows as motion records even when the APK `videoEvent` or `tags` fields are unknown.
- Keeps camera motion handling aligned with the APK history path by using the returned record timestamp instead of requiring a recognized motion label.

### Events
- Adds a dedicated camera Motion event entity for APK camera history records.
- Fires Motion events when a new camera history timestamp is received without fabricating a timed off/reset state.
- Includes available record metadata such as event type, trace ID, and event items in the Motion event payload.

### Validation
- Adds regression coverage for unknown camera history rows mapping to motion.
- Adds regression coverage for Motion event entities on station, child, and standalone cameras.
- Adds regression coverage to prevent duplicate Motion events from repeated history records.
